description: CompositionPink scoop neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic on the frontWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet ready to have fun with this pink tee from the Graphic collection from jealous 21. The graphic encourages you to go shopping with like minded missies. So get ready to go out and meet more fun women like yourself. Team this with faded jeans, shorts or a super cute denim mini skirt and stylish footwear from myntra's wide catalogue for that instant cool.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2.
